type: 学术论文方法 Pipeline 总览图（method overview figure）
goal: 生成一张可直接放进顶会论文或 SIGGRAPH 附件的 diffusion training pipeline 总览图，白底、几何精确、可单色印刷

canvas.render_quality: vector-clean look, anti-aliased edges, sharp text

title_caption.caption: Training-time pipeline of our text-conditioned latent diffusion model (LDM).

input.label: Image–Text Pairs (x, c)
input.thumbnail: a photo patch icon plus a one-line text caption block

items.name: VAE Encode
items.icon_or_glyph: a small encoder arrow mapping RGB tile to 4× downsampled latent grid

items.name: Noise & Timestep
items.icon_or_glyph: a latent tensor with random noise overlay and a clock glyph for t

items.name: U-Net ϵ_θ (Text-Cond.)
items.icon_or_glyph: U-shaped stack with a side branch for CLIP / T5 text tokens

items.name: Decoder & VAE
items.icon_or_glyph: MSE or v-prediction loss symbol pointing from prediction to target noise, next to a tiny decoder icon

output.label: Trained Weights θ
output.thumbnail: a small disk or checkpoint symbol with a '.ckpt' style label

stage_block_style.size_per_stage: around 120px wide × 80px tall, all stages identical size
stage_block_style.fill: very light #F1F5F9 for S1–S2, #ECFDF5 for S3, #FEF3C7 for S4 (grouping encode / denoise / loss)

connectors.rule: left to right; optional tiny label on arrow: 'z_t' between S2 and S3

skip_connections.rule: dashed skip from S1 latent representation arching to S3 input side, labeled 'skip connection' / 'residual on latent' if space allows

loss_branch.label: L = ||ε − ε_θ(z_t, t, c)||_2^2
loss_branch.rule: small dashed line from S3 output to a 'Loss' box above the main arrow, formula in italic

color_legend.rule: bottom-right: three swatches for encode / denoise / objective groups

must_keep: all stage blocks identical size and vertically aligned
English terminology for all stage titles and sub_labels
arrows and loss branch do not occlude main labels
avoid: cluttered hyperparameter tables inside the figure
